languages.text: "Прихвостни Той, Что Жаждет трясутся от ужаса? Ха! Ничего лучше я за сегодня уже не услышу".
languages.translation_comment: Near the terrible Necron temple, with a mixture of delight and fear

languages.original_text: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."

languages.text: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."

languages.text: «¿Los esbirros de la Sedienta tiemblan de terror? ¡Ja! Es lo mejor que he oído en todo el día».
languages.original_text: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."

traits.locale_text: «¿Los esbirros de la Sedienta tiemblan de terror? ¡Ja! Es lo mejor que he oído en todo el día».

languages.text: “饥渴女士的爪牙居然也会害怕？哈！这是我今天听到的最有意思的事情。”
languages.original_text: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."

traits.locale_text: “饥渴女士的爪牙居然也会害怕？哈！这是我今天听到的最有意思的事情。”

languages.text: « Les sbires de l'Assoiffée tremblent de peur ? Ha ! C'est la meilleure nouvelle de la journée ! »
languages.original_text: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."

traits.locale_text: « Les sbires de l'Assoiffée tremblent de peur ? Ha ! C'est la meilleure nouvelle de la journée ! »

languages.text: "Susayan'ın hizmetkârları dehşetle titriyor, öyle mi? Ha! Bu bugün duyduğum en güzel şey."
languages.original_text: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."

traits.locale_text: "Susayan'ın hizmetkârları dehşetle titriyor, öyle mi? Ha! Bu bugün duyduğum en güzel şey."

languages.text: 「渇望せし者の下僕どもが、恐怖に震えているだと？ ハッ！ 今日一日で聞いた中で、一番の朗報だな」
languages.original_text: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."

traits.locale_text: 「渇望せし者の下僕どもが、恐怖に震えているだと？ ハッ！ 今日一日で聞いた中で、一番の朗報だな」

languages.text: "Die Schergen von Ihr, die dürstet, fürchten sich? Ha! Das ist das Beste, was ich heute gehört habe!"
languages.original_text: "The minions of She Who Thirsts are quaking in terror? Ha! That's the best thing I have heard all day."

traits.locale_text: "Die Schergen von Ihr, die dürstet, fürchten sich? Ha! Das ist das Beste, was ich heute gehört habe!"
